params.form: {{(() => { const f = {..._local.form}; const g = [...(f.default_greetings ?? [])]; g[index] = $event.target.value; f.default_greetings = g; return f; })()}}

props.className: px-3 py-2 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors

params.form: {{(() => { const f = {..._local.form}; const g = [...(f.default_greetings ?? [])]; g.splice(index, 1); f.default_greetings = g; return f; })()}}
